---
name: ✅ Task / Chore
about: A defined unit of work, chore, or to-do item
title: "[TASK] "
labels: task
assignees: ''
---

## ✅ Task

### Description
<!-- What needs to be done? Be specific and actionable. -->

### Context / Why
<!-- Why is this task needed? Link to parent epic, ticket, or discussion if applicable. -->

### Subtasks
<!-- Break this down into concrete steps. -->
- [ ] Step 1
- [ ] Step 2
- [ ] Step 3

### Dependencies
<!-- Does this block or get blocked by another issue? -->
- Blocked by: #
- Blocks: #

### Assignee Notes
<!-- Any context the person picking this up should know. -->

### Definition of Done
- [ ] Work completed
- [ ] Tests passing (if applicable)
- [ ] Reviewed / approved
- [ ] Deployed / merged
